channel.title: Fireworks AI
channel.description: Fireworks AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Qwen 3.7 Plus is now live on Fireworks
item.description: Use state-of-the-art, open-source LLMs and image models at blazing fast speed, or fine-tune and deploy your own at no additional cost with Fireworks AI!

item.title: MiniMax M3 is live: long context + native multimodality at 1/20th the price
item.description: MiniMax M3 is now available on Fireworks AI with Day-0 support — delivering the first open-weight model to combine frontier-level coding, native multimodal understanding (images and video), and a 1M-token context window in a single model. Powered by MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), M3 achieves up to 15× faster decoding at long context compared to M2.7, with per-token compute dropping to 1/20th at 1M tokens. On coding and agentic benchmarks, M3 leads all open-source models and surpasses…

item.title: Kimi K2.7 Code on Fireworks: Better Agents, Lower Cost per Task, Available Day-0
item.description: Fireworks is launching Day-0 support for Kimi K2.7 Code, the latest model in Moonshot’s K2 coding series. Designed for long-horizon agentic coding, K2.7 Code leverages the established 1T parameter, 256K context window architecture while delivering a significant efficiency breakthrough. The standout feature of K2.7 Code is its reasoning efficiency: it utilizes approximately 30% fewer reasoning tokens than the previous K2.6 version, yet achieves higher scores across coding benchmarks, including…
